personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS Data Architect | S3 / Glue / Redshift / Cloud Migration

summary: Senior AWS Data Architect and Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across cloud data architecture, on-prem-to-cloud modernization, Python/PySpark ETL, SQL, AWS S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, data modeling, governance documentation, performance tuning, and production reliability. Strong background designing scalable analytics datasets, data lake and warehouse patterns, historical retention structures, validation controls, and migration support processes in regulated enterprise environments. Deepest production database background is Oracle/MySQL/Redshift/Athena, with SQL Server migration concepts as transferable/adjacent experience.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and supported AWS-aligned data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL patterns, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, IAM concepts, and CloudWatch-style monitoring concepts to modernize analytics workloads.

Built Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines that transformed telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for analytics, forecasting, capacity planning, and executive reporting.
Developed target-state data patterns for raw-to-curated processing, historical retention, reporting layers, validation routines, and stakeholder-facing analytics outputs.
Created reporting-ready datasets, Oracle-backed historical retention models, SQL views/tables, and query patterns for operational analytics and decision support.
Implemented data quality checks, validation rules, reconciliation logic, and issue investigation workflows to improve trust in downstream reporting and analytics outputs.
Produced data dictionaries, runbooks, validation notes, dashboard narratives, and process documentation to support governance, auditability, lineage-style traceability, and production handoff.
Partnered with infrastructure, technology, operations, and management stakeholders to translate business and capacity requirements into scalable data solutions.
Troubleshot data issues by tracing source feeds, schema changes, transformation logic, SQL behavior, missing data, and downstream reporting expectations.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, partitioning-oriented data layouts, and processing approaches to support scalable analytics and cost-aware reporting.
Built forecasting workflows with Prophet and scikit-learn on curated datasets to identify future capacity risks and support proactive planning.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine data platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving correctness, performance, and production reliability.
Built validation utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, data structures, and migration routines to maintain sub-second query latency and reduce production risk.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration-support processes to improve repeatability and cutover confidence.
Documented migration behavior, validation procedures, performance findings, and support patterns for enterprise engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Built SQL, Perl, and Korn Shell extraction/reporting scripts that automated recurring telemetry exports and improved repeatability of operational reports.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, reporting standards, and documentation used across regulated financial-services monitoring and operations teams.
Partnered with application, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose production bottlenecks using telemetry, SQL, and system evidence.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows using Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, C/C++, Java/J2EE, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux.
Maintained production data integration interfaces and reporting workflows where accuracy, repeatability, secure processing, and timely support were critical.
Improved data-processing performance through SQL/database optimization, memory reduction, throughput improvements, and production defect triage.
Created technical documentation and support notes for legacy systems, data interfaces, and operational processes.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Java, C, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON, YAML

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns to support curated analytics, query optimization, small-file mitigation, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: Legacy Database Migration and Validation Framework
projects.description: Led and supported high-volume on-prem database migration work involving source/target validation, schema conversion, SQL optimization, cutover support, and production reliability checks.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Platform
projects.description: Built an analytics pipeline that transformed operational telemetry into curated datasets for forecasting, capacity risk analysis, dashboarding, KPI-style reporting, and stakeholder decision-making.
